headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Xcel Energy Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: While Xcel Energy has lagged behind the SPX over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a bullish outlook about the stock’s prospects.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on CMS Energy, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $85 to $82.
